title: mesua clemensiorum
intro: Mesua clemensiorum, a species of flowering plant, is a member of the family Clusiaceae and is commonly known as the Bunga Kemuning or Yellow Kemuning. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Mesua clemensiorum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves or flowers are also used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and ointments.
